violations.text: Retail freezer unit located in the retail area was not in good repair (non-functional). No items were observed stored in unit during inspection. PIC has work order in for unit. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
The ceiling tiles in the retail area are in poor repair (old water damage and missing tile). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024
